words.context: Звонкий велярный носовой согласный звук, произносимый чаще всего при сочетании букв NG.
First minimal pair – thin, это спелт THIN, который переводится в русский тонкий.
Second word – thing, спелт THING, which translates to Russian вещь.
This is the second minimal pair. This word THON, which spelled THON or THONE, and it translates in Russian as тон.
Second word – tongue, спелто TONGUE, which translates to Russian язык.
Third pair – lawn, spelled LAWN, which translates in Russian as газон или лужайка.
Second word – long, спелто LONG, which translates to Russian длинный.
The construction of the Baikal GVD was motivated by its discovery potential in astrophysics, cosmology and particle physics. Please write down the word astrophysicist.
Please write down the word particle. It's spelled as P A R T I C L E And write down the translation частица.
The nucleus is the center of an atom. The plural form of nucleus is nuclei. Please write down the singular and plural forms for nucleus.
A proton is an elementary particle inside the nucleus of an atom with a positive charge. Write down a proton. It's spelled as P-R-O-T-O-N.
A neutron is an elementary particle in the nucleus of an atom with no electric charge. Write down the word neutron. The spelling is N-E-U-T-R-O-N.
An electron is an elementary particle with a negative charge that moves around the nucleus of an atom. Write down an electron. It's spelled as E-L-E-C-T-R-O-N.
How do you spell elementary? It's spelled as E-L-E-M-E-N-T-A-R-Y. Elementary particles.
The adverb precisely means in a way that's exact and correct.

This word translates into Russian as точность. Precise means exact, very correct. The adverb precisely means in a way that's exact and correct. And finally precision is the quality of being exact and careful.
To measure is a verb, the глагол, and it translates into Russian as измерять.
The noun is measurement. A measurement. To measure means to find the size, amount, or value. A measurement is the result when you measure something.
A neutrino. A neutrino. Note the two variations in the pronunciation. The first is British with a u sound, a new trino, and the second is American with an o sound, a new trino.

Volume is the amount of space something takes up, whereas voluminous is something very large. A voluminous piece of clothing is very large, that has a lot of cloth in it. Oversized clothing tends to be very voluminous, and a voluminous piece of writing is long and detailed. Here's an example sentence with the noun volume. Lake Baikal is the largest by volume freshwater lake in the world.
The Russian is more of an r sound, and the adjective is voluminous. Voluminous translates into Russian as объемный. Note the o-u-s ending. It's pronounced as an us, us sound. So only one vowel. Us.
The British pronounce it more with an o sound, common, whereas the American pronunciation is more with an o sound, common.
A common technique. A common technique is a usual way of doing something, especially in science or work.
Лейк Байкал содержит 23% свежей поверхности воды мира.
Потому что в его глубине, Лейк-бай-Кал – единственный лейк, где можно было установить нутриноглоб.
Пожалуйста, писите слово «width». Это переводится в русский как ширина.
Пожалуйста, писите слово «length». «Length» переводится в русский как длина.
Please write down the verb «to produce». It's spelled as p-r-o-d-u-c-e. «To produce» translates into Russian as «производить».
Please write down the adjective giant, which is spelled as G-I-A-N-T. Giant. It translates into Russian as «гигантский, огромный».
Also write down two synonyms for the word giant. They are huge, spelled as H-U-G-E, and enormous.
The spelling is E-N-O-R-M-O-U-S. Enormous means extremely large.
Detectable means something that can be noticed, discovered or found. Some good synonyms for detectable are observable and noticeable.
Undetected means not noticed, discovered or found. In other words, unnoticed.
Observe. Стоять на верху тона, это вербка, которая переводится в русском как наблюдать.
Обзорбл – это переводится в русском как наблюдательный. В других словах, это переводится в русском как внимательный. Наконец, обзорбл – это переводится в русском как наблюдательный.
Обзерваторий – это переводится в русском как наблюдательный.
Ликвид – это обзорбл. Ликвид – это обзорбл. Ликвид – это обзорбл.
Теизист – это вербль, который переводится в русский как существовать.
